item_specifications.recommended_uses_for_product: Camping, Car, Hiking, Multiple Pets, Outdoor, Travel

about_item: 1️⃣ COMPLETE 6-PIECE DOG TRAVEL KIT: Everything your dog needs for trips in one convenient bag. This dog travel bag organizer includes a quilted tote bag, 2 lined food containers, 2 collapsible BPA-free dog bowls, and a treat pouch, making it the perfect all-in-one pet travel kit for dog parks, road trips, and weekend adventures.

2️⃣ LARGE CAPACITY WITH SMART ORGANIZATION: Stay organized wherever you go. The spacious main compartment and multiple functional pockets easily store dog food, toys, leash, treats, grooming supplies, and accessories—keeping all your dog travel essentials neatly organized and easy to access.

3️⃣ STYLISH DOG MOM TOTE DESIGN: Looks like a fashionable tote, works like a professional dog travel organizer. The modern quilted puffer design blends seamlessly into everyday life, making it the perfect dog mom bag for errands, walks, and outings with your furry companion.

4️⃣ LIGHTWEIGHT, WATER-RESISTANT & AIRLINE APPROVED: Made with soft quilted water-resistant fabric, this lightweight yet durable pet travel bag keeps your dog’s supplies protected during travel. The compact design is airline approved and travel-friendly, making it perfect for flights, road trips, and weekend getaways.

5️⃣ PERFECT DOG MOM GIFT FOR PET LOVERS: A thoughtful and practical dog mom gift for pet lovers who enjoy adventures with their pups. Carry it your way with 3 versatile carrying options—use it as a shoulder tote, wear it crossbody for hands-free dog walks, or attach it to your suitcase with the luggage sleeve for effortless travel.

authors_reviews.title: Well designed bag with a couple quality concerns
authors_reviews.text: I was pleasantly surprised by this bag (well really, a pack of bags). I've been traveling extensively with my dog and I really didn't have a good solution for bringing his stuff into hotels and airbnbs. Wish I had this months ago. It's surprisingly roomy. Plenty of room for a water bottle, winter coat, dog shoes, leash, wipes, etc. in addition to the little food containers it comes with. All the little accessories it comes with collapse down nicely when you're not using them to save space. There are also a ton of little compartments and sections inside the bag, even on the back of the bag on the little fabric strip that you use to attach to a suitcase. The bag is practically a diaper bag for your dog, hah!Concerns:The hardware is all plastic except for the actual zipper pull. This gives me a slight concern for longevity if you're going to use this heavily or roughly.The stitching inside is ok, but there are some fabric edges sticking out and fraying.The inside lining fabric feels a bit cheap.
authors_reviews.author: Sarah F

authors_reviews.title: Great Pet Travel Bag That Makes a Good Backup Briefcase Too
authors_reviews.text: This CLAWIST Dog Travel Bag for Supplies is also great for cat travel — and for an emergency backup mobile office/laptop bag too.This Dog Travel Bag comes with everything you need to travel with Fido or Whiskers. You get the bag itself which is generous and spacious with an interior laptop sleeve plus 5 additional interior pockets — handy for pet toys or meds or even human bring-along items. The exterior has multiple additional pockets, a shoulder strap, handles to carry it like a handheld purse AND a sleeve on the back for it to slide over your suitcase handle for ease of transport as it can wheel along atop of your suitcase — love all the utility in just that much of this product.The bag itself comes with 2 easy to clean pet food bags that zip close to secure the kibbles— and they also collapse flat when not in use. It also comes with a zippered treat bag - nice additional touch. And it also comes with 2 BPA-free collapsible bowls to hold food and water when you arrive at your destination with the pet(s).Overall, the aesthetics of this bag are good as I like the sleek grey & plush appearance and super soft feel. The utility of all the pockets on the inside and outside is off the charts and highly useful and functional. I do worry about the durability of this product as all the zippers are plastic — not metal — and that can go either way: sometimes there are no issues and the zippers last for years, other times plastic zippers go off the rails on the third tug and break, ruining the product in full. Only time will tell if the zippers are durable with longevity and long-term functionality. That said, the rest of the bag is so well thought out in design in terms of all the pockets you might need for things to travel with your pet that I still believe this product deserves 5 stars because the designers literally thought of EVERYTHING you could want in a pet travel bag. Love that!I ordered this pet travel bag because I was the designated babysitter for my sister’s 2 cats while she went out of town for a vacation. I was going to need to bring the cats back and forth between our houses so I knew I would need something to carry everything in - between the 2 houses. This product was perfect for that use case. I ended up using the food bag, the treat bag, the other food bag for extra litter (just in case!) and all of the many pockets for their 50 favorite cat toys. The interior of the bag easily held both cat beds — plus my laptop. It was a great, handy bag to have to ferry the felines back and forth.As an added bonus, I was running late to a deposition one day when my regular briefcase broke — and there was no salvaging it. I was able to use THIS pet travel bag to carry my laptop, all my files, my mouse, pens, headphones, fidget widget, cellphones and chargers all together in this bag — and it really saved the day. And literally no one side-eyed my plush “ad hoc briefcase” at the meeting — so my dignity remains intact. In that sense - I realized during trial-by-briefcase-disaster that this bag makes an excellent backup work bag in the event you need one last minute, in a jam. So for that it gets extra kudos from me.I think this is a good value at this price point and definitely recommend this bag to you for all your pet travel — or emergency, backup work travel needs.
authors_reviews.author: Deb

authors_reviews.title: Portable and stylish dog accessories
authors_reviews.text: The bag is well thought out. I think it focused more on style than necessary. However, the accessories are nice quality and useful for outings.The stylish bag is a nice addition.
authors_reviews.author: Pixie Power! ®
